sections.raw:
**Solutions for Every Mission-Critical Challenge**From crisis prevention to criminal investigation, VerusAI delivers the AI-powered intelligence agencies need to protect communities and save lives.**Contraband Investigations** Track and stop cell phones, drugs, and weapons flowing into facilities
**Suicide Prevention** Early intervention through AI-powered conversation monitoring
**Criminal Network Disruption** Stop command & control operations run from inside facilities
**Gang Activity Prevention** Monitor communications, identify threats before they escalate
**Operational Efficiency** Build capacity without headcount—millions in potential savings
**Cross-Agency Intelligence** Support FBI, DEA, and multi-jurisdictional investigations
(note to team: need to discuss how deep we can go on success stories, and get more details on each. Would include as a sorting feature in News section)
